_doc: Ratchet baseline — these metrics may ONLY decrease (or stay equal). Pre-push gate fails when a metric regresses past these caps. To improve: ship the improvement + lower the value here in the same commit, explicit reasoning in commit message. Adapted from stankoff-v2 canonical pattern (`fix(test): vitest 4 isolate:false` lineage 2026-05-08).
_updated_by_commit: fix(a-bis.5.audit) — pnpm overrides serialize-javascript@^7.0.5 closes last high CVE — audit_high 1→0 (ALL prod CVEs resolved)
_depcruise_baseline_note: 0 (clean across 790 modules / 2313 deps). Any new circular / banned import → fail.
_knip_baseline_note: 0 — clean. New unused export / file / dep → fail.
_audit_baseline_note: **0 high CVEs** after A.bis.5 senior self-audit close 2026-05-12. Journey: A.bis.2.fix introduced ratchet at 7 PRE-EXISTING; cc90f62 dropped к 6; f879d25 latest-stable dep bump cascade dropped к 1; this commit applies `pnpm overrides`: `serialize-javascript@^7.0.5` (force resolves transitive via vite-plugin-pwa>workbox-build>@rollup/plugin-terser) → 0. Only 2 LOW severity advisories remain (`tmp` package via @lhci/cli devDep — not counted by ratchet high_critical_max). Any NEW high+critical → fail.
_ts_strict_baseline_note: 0 (4 workspaces strict, EXIT=0). Any TS error → fail.
_biome_baseline_note: 0 errors (28 → 6 → 0 после A.bis.2 fix-up cleanup). Warnings tracked separately, не gate. New error → fail.
_weak_assertions_baseline_note: 234 — initial measurement 2026-05-12. PRE-EXISTING from prior milestones. NOT a regression from A.bis.2; locked here as starting point. Ratchet down each milestone closure (per `feedback_strict_tests.md` canon — exact-value asserts > existence-only). New `.toBeDefined()/.toBeTruthy()/.toBeFalsy()/.toBeInstanceOf(Array)` → count > 234 → fail.
_multi_line_biome_ignore_baseline_note: 0 after A.bis.2.fix collapsed 10 PRE-EXISTING M10 multi-line biome-ignore comments. New multi-line `// biome-ignore` → suppression doesn't reach the violation → fail. Move comment directly above the violating line OR use `biome-ignore-start/end` block syntax.

_excluded.test_leaks: Vitest 4 detect-async-leaks reports false positives on Promise.race losing branches per stankoff research 2026-04-25. Structural noise, не prod threat.
_excluded.mutation_score: Stryker 9.6.1 too slow для per-PR ratchet (20+ min). Tracked separately on-demand per `project_coverage_mutation_gates.md`.
_excluded.biome_warnings: Hygiene track, не regression gate. Currently 0 after cleanup; if rises, address per priority (not blocked).
_excluded.missing_tests: Sochi monorepo doesn't follow service/repo file convention strictly (mixed factory/service patterns per domain). Re-introduce когда patterns stabilize.
